claimText: Tsinghua University requires graduate supervisors to provide normative guidance on AI use and maintain full-process oversight to ensure the integrity of academic training and the originality of theses, dissertations, and practical achievements.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 研究生指导教师需在此过程中提供规范性指导并进行全过程监督，确保学术训练的完整性和学位论文及实践成果的原创性。

citation.citationTitle: 【深改进行时】《清华大学人工智能教育应用指导原则》发布
